name: RADIANT LOGISTICS, INC
sic_description: Arrangement of  Transportation of  Freight & Cargo
summary: Radiant Logistics, Inc. is a non-asset-based third-party logistics company providing technology-enabled global transportation and value-added logistics services primarily in the United States and Canada. Services include domestic and international freight forwarding, freight brokerage (air, ocean, truckload, LTL, intermodal), materials management and distribution, customs house brokerage, and global trade management. The company operates through a multi-brand network of over 100 locations, including independent strategic operating partners and approximately 30 company-owned locations.
